mapper.select: select count(1) from cmp_bankreconciliation where isrepeat is null and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.update: update cmp_bankreconciliation set isrepeat=0 where isrepeat is null and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cmp_bankdealdetail where isrepeat is null and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.update: update cmp_bankdealdetail set isrepeat=0 where isrepeat is null and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
